name: skill-routing-eval
description: CI/CD evaluation: embedding similarity for skill routing accuracy + lint gates

scripts.ci: node lint-descriptions.mjs && node lint-instructions.mjs --cross && node lint-context.mjs && node confusion-matrix.mjs --ci
scripts.ci:full: node lint-descriptions.mjs && node lint-instructions.mjs --cross && node lint-context.mjs && node confusion-matrix.mjs --ci && node score-cross-branch.mjs --ci
